description: urllib3 is a powerful, user-friendly HTTP client for Python. Used by requests and many others.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/urllib3 && python3 urllib3.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/urllib3 && python3 urllib3.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/urllib3 && python3 urllib3.py --help`. HTTP client (powering requests).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: HTTP client (powering requests).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: HTTP client (powering requests).

name: urllib3
